text.title: Monthly Billing Batch Routine Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Monthly Billing Batch Routine methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pull-ledger
step.action: Pull invoices issued, payments received, contractor hours logged.

step.name: build-invoices
step.action: Compute per-customer invoice lines with evidence citations.
step.decision-gate: Halt if any non-zero line lacks evidence.

step.name: build-payouts
step.action: Compute per-contractor payout lines with evidence citations.

step.name: compute-margin-and-delta
step.input: Built invoices + payouts + prior month batch
step.action: Run the script to compute margin from line items + reconcile prior_month_delta.

step.name: hand-to-founder
step.action: Set status=ready_for_review; surface to founder with margin-trend chart.
step.decision-gate: Founder approval required before any send fires.
